questionHtml: State the conclusion of the test in the context of the question. Justify your answer.
markschemeHtml:
0.119395…>0.05  (11.9395…%>5%)          R1

(fail to reject H0) there is insufficient evidence to suggest that bilingual people have better memory retention than monolingual people          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

The answer to part (c) MUST be consistent with their hypotheses and their p-value.

 

[2 marks]
